summary: nexus raw 1 ADD-new (FIRST raw entry in nexus repo registry — bootstrap). User directive verbatim 2026-05-01: 'A. kick 의 최적 작동 (블로킹 0, 자원은 외부자원사용, hexa 작동은 반드시 외부자원이어야한다)' + 'aa axis A 는 nexus 영역.'. Axis A optimal model spec — kick MUST be non-blocking (caller fire-and-forget, no sync await), MUST use external resources (Mac local CPU/RAM 부하 0, ubu1/ubu2/htz remote host), AND hexa execution itself MUST be external (Mac local hexa_interp spawn 금지 — 모든 hexa run 은 hive resource exec 통해 외부 host). A-modules already-land (modules_registry.hxc B section): kick_main 8.95 / kick_core 8.95 / kick_concurrency_lock 9.30 / nexus_kick_handler 9.30 / kick_dispatch 9.05 / hexa_url_handler 8.85 / hexa_url_gate 8.95 / launchd_queue_drain 8.30 / cli_run_entry_guard 8.05 / oauth_slot_pre_kick_gate 8.85 / 25+ total. Active binding: kick_concurrency_lock 9.30 (raw 240 v2). Paired with hive raw 260 (META-pattern) + raw 261 (B+C hive specialization). Banned: Mac local hexa fire (KICK_LEGACY_LOCAL=1 fallback 영구 폐기 per raw 100 alternative-dispatcher post-2026-04-29 directive); blocking sync await in core fire API; hardcoded module path (active_bindings.hxc lookup mandatory). Sanctioned: hive resource exec ubu2 --command 'hexa run nexus/cli/run.hexa kick run "$TOPIC"'. Falsifier F-NEXUS-RAW1-1: 30d post Mac local hexa_interp spawn detected during kick fire = retire active. F-NEXUS-RAW1-2: blocking_detected_count > 0 over rolling 30d = retire. F-NEXUS-RAW1-3: external_host_dispatch_rate < 0.99 = strengthen. raw 117 5-check ALL PASS.
